captions: Scored 15/100 — Financially Fragile. My credit cards are literally co-signing my lifestyle at 21% interest 💳🔥
15/100. The average credit card APR is 21%… and apparently I let mine move in rent-free. This is embarrassing.
From letting debt run my life to knowing better — 15/100 is the rock bottom that finally made me pay attention 👀
Scored 33/100 — Financially Fragile. Turns out 'I'll figure it out' is not a budget strategy. But awareness is step one. 🛋️
Most people with $4k/mo income don't realize CC interest is quietly eating hundreds a month. I didn't either. My score: 33/100. 😬
33/100 and finally ready to stop funding Visa's earnings call with my paycheck. Healing era starts now. 💪✨
Scored 45/100 — 'Surviving' is generous when you're earning six figures and still losing the credit card game 😅
Making $180k/year and carrying $50k in credit card debt is more common than you think. The income isn't the fix. The habits are. 💡
45/100 today, but knowing your score is literally step one. The comeback is already in progress. 🌱
Scored 51/100 — Surviving. Got the house, got the job, saving $200/mo like I'm filling a Ferrari with $5 of gas 💀📉
51% of Americans with a mortgage carry CC debt. I am VERY much that statistic and my scorecard just called me out 😭🔥
CC balance was the villain. 51/100 is the wake-up call. The glow-up arc starts now — watch this space 💪📈
Scored 87/100 on my finances and honestly? Even I didn't expect to be this person 😅 older me is shook.
87/100 — only 13% away from perfect, but inflation is out here quietly nibbling at idle cash like a sneaky little gremlin 👀
Turns out years of saying 'no' to stuff actually adds up. 87/100 and Thriving. Future me says thank you 🙌
87/100. I'm thriving financially and somehow that's still not enough to stop me from stress-checking my bank app at 2am. 💅
The average American saves less than 5% of their income. I scored 87/100 and inflation is STILL out here personally victimizing me. 😤
From budgeting on vibes to an 87 — turns out 'Thriving' hits different when you actually did the work. The glow-up is real. 🔥
